Tech Notes: Temperature warning returned during first shift
Action Taken: Verified oil level and cleaned cooler fins

Tech Notes: Vibration increased under load and press sounded rough
Action Taken: Replaced worn bearing and monitored next production run

Tech Notes: Coolant flow was weak at tool change station
Action Taken: Flushed coolant nozzle and cleaned chip screen

Tech Notes: Spindle alarm returned after machine warmed up
Action Taken: Replaced loose sensor cable and tested restart cycle

Tech Notes: Operator reported weld path shifting on same fixture
Action Taken: Recalibrated TCP and tightened fixture locating pin

Tech Notes: Pressure exceeded normal range during plant startup
Action Taken: Adjusted regulator and scheduled separator inspection

Tech Notes: Belt drift returned at accumulation zone
Action Taken: Realigned idler roller and marked belt edge position

Tech Notes: Filter pressure warning repeated after color change
Action Taken: Replaced secondary filter and inspected exhaust fan belt

Tech Notes: Feed motor area was hot and vibration was visible
Action Taken: Opened urgent inspection for bearing assembly and lubrication flow

Tech Notes: Oil temperature alarm returned after restart
Action Taken: Kept compressor on watch and requested cooler cleaning window
